summary: Completed frontend testing of CTA button layout changes. Hero CTA buttons (Call, Book, Email) display correctly in one row on both desktop and mobile. Mobile quick CTA bar successfully shows all three buttons side-by-side. All button hrefs verified correct. Minor issue: desktop Final CTA buttons wrap to two rows instead of staying in one row.

ui_bugs.issue: Call, Book, and Email buttons wrap to two rows instead of staying in one horizontal row. Call button appears alone on first row, Book and Email on second row.
ui_bugs.details: Button positions: Call (Y=679.3), Book (Y=735.3), Email (Y=735.3). The .cta-row has flex-wrap: wrap which causes wrapping. Need to ensure buttons stay in one row on desktop viewports.

passed_tests: Landing page loads without runtime errors
Hero CTA buttons (Call, Book, Email) display in one row on desktop
Hero CTA buttons stay in one row on mobile (390px viewport) without clipping or horizontal overflow
Mobile hero buttons show short labels (Call, Book, Email) correctly
Mobile quick CTA bar displays all three buttons (Call, Book, Email) side-by-side in one row
All button hrefs verified: Call (tel:6314017026), Book (Google Forms placeholder), Email (Gmail compose)
Services section accordions remain closed by default (no regression)
About section content intact, Why Choose Us accordion closed by default (no regression)
Final CTA buttons visible and functional on mobile
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix desktop Final CTA button layout: buttons are wrapping to two rows instead of staying in one horizontal row. The Call button appears alone on the first row, with Book and Email on the second row. Adjust .cta-row or .final-cta-shell CSS to prevent wrapping on desktop viewports (1920px). All other requirements are working correctly.
